reason: The image depicts a group of people in modern business attire, all holding and looking at smartphones. This is a major anachronism, as smartphones were not widely available until the late 2000s, and the Cambridge Analytica scandal occurred in 2018. The room itself has modern office lighting and décor, including modern office chairs and likely a modern computer screen in the foreground. These elements are far too modern for any depiction prior to the late 2000s.
